summary: Iteration 41: Tested Admin Messaging, Spelling Bee contests, Notification bell, Word bank prices, and Student form virtues. All backend APIs pass (14/14 tests). All frontend UI elements verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin Messaging system: POST/GET/DELETE endpoints working, notifications delivered to all/guardians/students/teachers
Spelling Bee contests: Full CRUD + submit + leaderboard working, scoring is correct (case-insensitive comparison)
Notification bell: Visible in both Admin and Student headers with unread count badge
Word bank prices: Clearly visible in Marketplace - FREE badges green/yellow, $X.XX prices on colored backgrounds
Student form virtues: Unlimited selection with 32 character virtues + 30 emotional intelligence options with search and custom input
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed messages and spelling contests during API testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified all new features working: Admin Messaging tab sends to all/groups with priority levels, Spelling Bee contests with timer and leaderboard, Notification bell in AppShell header for both guardians and students, Word bank prices visible with good contrast in Marketplace, Student form has 32 virtues + 30 emotions with unlimited selection and search.

admin_messaging.POST /api/admin/messages: PASSED - Creates message with title, body, target, priority
admin_messaging.GET /api/notifications: PASSED - Returns messages for logged-in user with unread_count

spelling_contests.POST /api/admin/spelling-contests: PASSED - Creates contest with words, time limit, dates
spelling_contests.GET /api/spelling-contests: PASSED - Returns active contests with participant_count

word_banks.GET /api/word-banks: PASSED - All banks have price field

admin_portal_messaging_tab.details: Form with subject, body, target (Everyone/Parents/Students/Teachers), priority (Low/Normal/High/Urgent), send button. Sent Messages list visible.

admin_portal_spelling_tab.details: Form with title, words (comma-separated), time limit, start/end dates. Contest list with LIVE/PAUSED/ENDED badges, Leaderboard button.

notification_bell_admin.details: Bell icon in header, unread count badge visible (showed '1'), panel opens with messages list

notification_bell_student.details: Bell icon in student header, unread count badge visible (showed '2'), panel opens with 5 notification items

student_spelling_bee_section.details: Spelling Bee button in header, contest list with 2 contests showing Start and Leaderboard buttons

marketplace_word_bank_prices.details: FREE badges visible (green/yellow), $4.99 price visible for paid banks. Good contrast on colored backgrounds.

student_form_virtues.details: Virtues & Emotional Intelligence section with unlimited selection, search input, custom input. Shows 32 Character Virtues (Patience, Kindness, etc.) and 30 Emotional Intelligence options (Joy, Love, etc.)

verified_features.admin_messaging: Admin can send messages to all/guardians/students/teachers with priority levels
verified_features.spelling_bee_admin: Admin can create contests with word list, time limit, start/end dates
verified_features.spelling_bee_student: Students see active contests, can start, submit answers, view leaderboard
verified_features.notification_bell: Shows unread count, opens panel with messages, click to mark read
verified_features.word_bank_prices: Prices clearly visible with good contrast in Marketplace tab
verified_features.student_form_virtues: 32 character virtues + 30 emotional intelligence options, search, custom input, unlimited selection

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real implementations connected to MongoDB
